title: MDA ai-script payload
description: Schema for the JSON payload of an `ai-script`. Used both inline (inside ```ai-script fences in .mda sources) and externalized (as scripts/<script-id>.ai-script.json files in compiled outputs).

script-id.description: Unique identifier for this script within the document/skill. Used as the filename when externalized.

prompt.description: The instruction or prompt text to send to the LLM/agent.

auto-run.description: Hint that this script should run automatically when the document/skill is activated.

provider.description: Preferred AI provider identifier (e.g. anthropic, openai, google).

model-name.description: Preferred model name within the provider (e.g. claude-opus-4-7, gpt-4o).

parameters.description: Provider-specific parameters passed alongside the prompt.

retry-times.description: Hint for max retry attempts on failure. Runtime determines actual retry logic.

runtime-env.description: Suggested runtime environment or endpoint (e.g. browser, server, edge, docker, on-site-default, or a URL).

output-format.description: Desired output format. Implied as `json` if `output-schema` is provided.

output-schema.description: JSON Schema for the expected output. Implies output-format=json.

interactive-type.description: Type of interactive UI to render when auto-run is false.

interactive-label.description: Label for the interactive component (button text).

interactive-placeholder.description: Placeholder text for inputbox-type interactive components.
